message:
fix(mvcc,pager,vdbe,harness): refactor SSI edge discovery to inline overlap checks, fix receiver mutability and pager page-1 reads

SSI validation (ssi_validation.rs):
- Remove IndexedTxnRecord, build_reader_index, and build_writer_index intermediate
  data structures that pre-indexed by page number into BTreeMaps
- Rewrite discover_incoming_edges and discover_outgoing_edges to iterate candidates
  directly (active then committed), checking overlap inline via the new
  check_read_overlap/check_write_overlap trait methods on ActiveTxnView
- For committed readers/writers, fall back to page-level PageNumber containment
  checks since they lack full WitnessKey data
- Early-break on first overlapping key per candidate, reducing redundant work
- Add check_read_overlap and check_write_overlap to the ActiveTxnView trait to
  allow implementors to perform fine-grained witness_keys_overlap filtering

ActiveTxnView implementations (begin_concurrent.rs, ssi_anomaly_tests.rs):
- Implement check_read_overlap and check_write_overlap on ConcurrentHandle,
  HandleView, and both MockActiveTxn types by delegating to witness_keys_overlap
- Import witness_keys_overlap from witness_plane module in begin_concurrent

Pager (pager.rs):
- Replace raw db_file.read + short-read error handling for page 1 in
  serialize_freelist_to_write_set with inner.read_page_copy, which goes through
  the proper cache/read path and avoids duplicated corruption-check logic

VDBE codegen (codegen.rs):
- Move Span import to top-level fsqlite_ast import block instead of re-importing
  it inside the tests module, fixing the duplicate import

Harness tests (commit_pipeline.rs, cancel_safety.rs):
- Add mut to receiver bindings in test_two_phase_reserve_then_send,
  test_fifo_ordering_under_contention,
  test_fifo_ordering_under_contention_disconnect_semantics, and
  test_e2e_commit_pipeline_cancel_safety to satisfy updated CommitPipeline API
  requiring mutable receiver access

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
